Discover

About Hotel Njenka

Your Home Away From Home in Yaoundé

Located in the vibrant Ahala-Barriere (derriere la station neptune.) EZALA Blend of modern comfort and traditional Cameroonian warmth. Since our establishment, we have been committed to providing exceptional hospitality to both business and leisure travelers.

Our prime location in Esono gives you easy access to Yaoundé's business districts, cultural attractions, and the city's best dining and entertainment options. Whether you're visiting for business or pleasure, Hotel Njenka provides the perfect base for your Yaoundé experience.

Facilities

Hotel Services

🍽️

Restaurant

Enjoy authentic Cameroonian dishes and international cuisine in our restaurant. Open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

🍹

Bar & Lounge

Relax with drinks and light snacks in our comfortable bar area. Perfect for business meetings or casual gatherings.

🏢

Conference Room

Modern meeting facilities equipped with projector, WiFi, and seating for up to 50 people.

🚗

Free Parking

Secure, monitored parking available 24/7 for all hotel guests at no additional charge.

🧳

Airport Transfer

Convenient shuttle service to and from Yaoundé Nsimalen International Airport upon request.

🧹

Laundry Service

Professional laundry and dry cleaning services available with quick turnaround times.

🎯

Concierge

Our friendly staff can help arrange tours, transportation, and restaurant reservations.

🔒

24/7 Security

Round-the-clock security personnel and surveillance for your peace of mind.

Reserve

Book Your Stay

* We will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your reservation.

Booking Information

Check-in/Check-out

Check-in: 2:00 PM
Check-out: 12:00 PM

Cancellation Policy

Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in. Late cancellations or no-shows will be charged one night's stay.

Payment Methods

We accept cash (FCFA), Mobile Money (MTN, Orange), and credit/debit cards.
